info.name: IntelliFit API
info.description: Complete and tested Postman collection for IntelliFit API. All endpoints verified working as of Dec 20, 2025. Includes AI Chat Sessions and Token Transaction endpoints. Test Member: member@intellifit.com (ID: 1, Pass: 224466). Test Coach: sarah.johnson@intellifit.com (ID: 7, Pass: 224466). Set {{BaseUrl}} = http://localhost:5025 and {{token}} will be auto-populated after login.

request.description: Use numeric difficulty: 1=Easy, 2=Medium, 3=Hard
Note: Returns 404 if user has no measurements
Test endpoint to verify AI service is running
Start a new AI chat session. Costs 1 token. Returns sessionId for continuing the conversation.
Continue an existing chat session. Include SessionId from previous response. Costs 1 token per message.
Get all chat sessions for a user with message count and preview
Get all messages in a specific chat session
Generate a personalized workout plan using AI. Costs 50 tokens.
Generate a personalized nutrition plan using AI. Costs 50 tokens.
Get chat history (old format without sessions). Use Get User Chat Sessions instead.

Generate a personalized AI workout plan using Flan-T5 ML model. Includes user context (InBody, strength profile, muscle scan). Results cached for 24h unless forceRegenerate is true. Returns plan with exercises, sets, reps, and progressive overload recommendations. FitnessLevel: Beginner|Intermediate|Advanced. Goal: Muscle|Strength|WeightLoss|Cardio|Endurance.

body.raw:
{
  "workoutLogId": 1,
  "rating": 4,
  "difficultyLevel": "perfect",
  "exerciseFeedbacks": [
    {
      "exerciseId": 1,
      "exerciseName": "Bench Press",
      "actualWeight": 80,
      "actualSets": 4,
      "actualReps": 10,
      "weightFeeling": "perfect",
      "difficultyFeeling": "just_right",
      "notes": "Great exercise, felt strong"
    },
    {
      "exerciseId": 5,
      "exerciseName": "Squat",
      "actualWeight": 120,
      "actualSets": 4,
      "actualReps": 8,
      "weightFeeling": "too_heavy",
      "difficultyFeeling": "too_hard",
      "notes": "Struggled on last set"
    }
  ],
  "comments": "Overall great workout, but squat was challenging",
  "feedbackType": "workout_completion"
}

request.description: Submit feedback after completing a workout. Updates user's strength profile based on weight feelings (too_light, perfect, too_heavy). Adjusts 1RM estimates and increases confidence scores. This data personalizes future workout plan generations. WeightFeeling: too_light|perfect|too_heavy. DifficultyFeeling: too_easy|just_right|too_hard.
Check if ML service (FastAPI on port 5300) is available and model is loaded. Returns health status and message. No authentication required.

Get user's strength profile with estimated 1RM for all exercises they've performed. Includes confidence scores, trends (improving/plateauing), and feedback count. Used to personalize workout weight recommendations.

Get user's latest muscle development scan results from AI vision analysis. Shows muscle scores, underdeveloped areas, well-developed areas, body fat estimate, and asymmetry detection. Used to focus workout plans on weak muscle groups.

query.description: Maximum number of feedback records to return (default: 20)

request.description: Get user's workout feedback history. Shows ratings, difficulty levels, exercise-specific feedback, and comments. Useful for tracking workout progression and user satisfaction over time.

Call the ML service directly (bypasses C# backend). For testing and debugging purposes. Returns raw ML service response with plan data, latency metrics, and model version. Port 5300 must be accessible.
Direct health check of ML service. Returns status, version, mode (rule_based or ml), exercises count, and timestamp. No authentication required.

item.name: Direct ML Service - Get Body Parts

request.description: Get list of all body parts in the exercise database. Returns array of body part names (chest, back, legs, etc.).
Get list of all equipment types in the database. Returns array of equipment names (barbell, dumbbell, cable machine, etc.).
Query exercises from the ML service database. Filter by body_part, equipment, or get all. Returns exercise details including name, target muscles, equipment, and image URLs (if available).
Note: Requires Admin role, returns Forbidden for regular users
